subcodes.title: Words to Madame D'astre, spoken on 1913-01-29
subcodes.first_line: When a person is a light sleeper, one single touch will awake him, if he sleeps heavily, then one must awake him by shaking him... if even this will not awake the sleeper we will then have to use dynamite.
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @growth of the Cause, @predictions and prophecies
